reviews.comment:
Recién cargue gasoil en mi vehículo primero no sé si estaban cerrando caja me dijieron que esperara  se fueron a la oficina cuando vuelven uno de los muchachos va a cargar a otro vehículo le digo que estaba de antes .Se enojo cargo de mala gana cuando le pedí si me podía cargar los puntos me dejó el ticket de mi compra de mala manera y se fue.y eso que la que estuvo esperandolos casi 20 minutos fui yo

(Translated by Google)
I just filled up my car with diesel. At first, I don't know if they were closing up, but they told me to wait while they went to the office. When they came back, one of the guys went to fill up another car. I told him I'd been there before. He got angry and reluctantly filled up. When I asked if he could credit my points, he rudely gave me my receipt and left. And I was the one who waited for them for almost 20 minutes!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURudHFHT013EAE

reviews.comment:
Vine a comer con mis hijas y una de las hamburguesas magna estaba dura.pedimos que porfavor nos cambien la hamburguesa pero la carne seguia estando dura, se ve que estaba pasada ya. Las papas horribles porque estaban recalentadas. No vuelvo más. Perdi plata.

(Translated by Google)
I came to eat with my daughters and one of the large hamburgers was tough. We asked them to please replace it, but the meat was still tough; it was clearly overcooked. The fries were awful because they were reheated. I'm never coming back. I wasted my money.
